chunks.text: BEARS 2021: Schedule - EECS at Berkeley BEARS 2021: Schedule Time Event 9:00 – 9:05 am Opening Remarks Jeff Bokor and John Canny 9:05 – 9:30 am Distinguished Alumni Awards Presentation Hari Balakrishnan (CS Academia) Hsing Kung (EE Industry) Ralph Merkle (CS Industry) George Pappas (EE Academia) 9:30 – 10:00 am Gopala Anumanchipalli A Human-Centered Agenda for Spoken Language AI 10:00 – 10:20 am Lightning Talk Qianyi Xie Ultra-Stable MEMS Oscillator for Future Timing Requirements 10:20 – 10:50 am Angjoo Kanazawa Perceiving 3D Humans in Movies 10:50 – 11:10 am Lightning Talk Stephanie Wang Fault tolerance in Ray: A general-purpose distributed system 11:10 – 11:40 am Boubacar Kanté Topological Lasers, Antennas, and Sensors 11:40 am – 12:00 pm Lightning Talk Mallika Bariya Tracking Physiological Health with Wearable Sweat Sensors 12:00 – 12:20 pm LUNCH 12:20 – 12:50 pm Alp Sipahigil Quantum Devices 12:50 – 1:10 pm Lightning Talk Abraham Gonzalez Chipyard: An Open Source Framework for Agile SoCs 1:10 – 1:40 pm Nika Haghtalab One for one, or All for All: Equilibria and Optimality of Collaboration in Federated Learning 1:40 PM Closing Remarks < BEARS 2021: Leaders BEARS 2021: Registration > View Open Faculty Positions
